features.evidence: 5 lakhs god damn so the flagship space between 60 to 880,000 is now empty enter this xiaomi 14 xiaomi s best smartphone for india they have literally put the best specs you can get you get the latest snapdragon 8 gen 3 50 map triple camera 90 w fast charging 12 gb ram 512 gb storage so the question that has to be asked is is this phone only hardware specs or is it really that good we ll find that out together now you get the phone case that s a good black case paperwork 120 w charger usb a2 typ c cable s ejector tool come on sh it s a flagship phone take away the charger on a serious note the charger that you get with the phone also supports pd charging so see here you can even charge your laptop with the same charger so you don t need to carry these bulky laptop charger in the bag now there are three really interesting things with the phone where xiaomi has built exclusively for this phone and this is what makes this xiaomi 14 stand up number one display now the xiaomi 14 has a 6 However, there are still some missing features the extra dim mode for using your phone at night and a lot of battery usage information missing including screen on time and battery health info

features.evidence: here s a new globally available camera phone from xiaomi the xiaomi 14 i m will for gsm marina and let s find out what the xiaomi 14 is all about in our full review the xiaomi 14 isn t just a refresh of the previous model it brings plenty of upgrades including a better display and chipset faster charging and completely revamped camera hardware so while we won t get a pro model this year the xiaomi 14 packs a pro lev feature set within a compact form factor the design here isn t very different from what we ve seen before from xiaomi the noticeable change is the beefier camera bump which protrudes more from the back the chinese version can come in vegan leather but the global version can only have a glass back it s easy to smudge and it curves into the flat aluminum frame overall the phone s glossy finish leaves it a bit on the slippery side and last year s model the xiaomi 14 has ip68 rting rist protection against dust and water the display of the phone is a 6

features.evidence: well this is xiaomi s most hype flagship xiaomi 4 now there s a general trend if you have seen both samsung and apple concentrate their highest features on the ultra and pro series which cost way more at 1 However, hyperos still brings over a miui bad habit i really didn t expect to see on a xiaomi flagship

5 lakhs god damn so the flagship space between 60 to 880,000 is now empty enter this xiaomi 14 xiaomi s best smartphone for india they have literally put the best specs you can get you get the latest snapdragon 8 gen 3 50 map triple camera 90 w fast charging 12 gb ram 512 gb storage so the question that has to be asked is is this phone only hardware specs or is it really that good we ll find that out together now you get the phone case that s a good black case paperwork 120 w charger usb a2 typ c cable s ejector tool come on sh it s a flagship phone take away the charger on a serious note the charger that you get with the phone also supports pd charging so see here you can even charge your laptop with the same charger so you don t need to carry these bulky laptop charger in the bag now there are three really interesting things with the phone where xiaomi has built exclusively for this phone and this is what makes this xiaomi 14 stand up number one display now the xiaomi 14 has a 6 However,  the video quality is not as impressive as the stills, but it s still one of the cleanest video shooters i ve seen from the android side

36 in 120 hz oled last year but now you get a higher resolution ltpo te and grilla glass victus protection the higher resolution amounts to 460 ppi which is sharper than what we got on the xiaomi 13 s 1080p display also you now get support for 12 bit color depth other premium features such as hdr1 plus and dolby vision are back too and because this panel is ltpo the 120 hz refresh rate is extra adaptive we saw dial down to as low as 10 herz to save energy and a minimum of 1 herz should be possible when it comes to brightness the xiaomi doesn t disappoint we measured a maximum of about 500 nits with a manual slider which can boost up to nearly 1,200 nits in auto mode when needed for audio the xiaomi 14 has a pair of stereo speakers with very good loudness quality wise the speakers are great with good sounding vocals and heavier bass than competitors for biometrics there s an underd display fingerprint reader it s very responsive but we wish the placement was a bit higher up and the xiaomi 14 can come with 256 or 512 gigs or a terabyte of storage on board the interface of the phone is xiaomi s new hyper os 1
